title: Standardize Created Date Format to Match Modified Date Column
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Created Date column to use the same compact format as the Modified Date column, so that dates are consistent and don't waste column space.
description: Standardizes the Created Date column format to match the Modified Date format. The original Created Date was using a verbose format that took up excessive column width with redundant information. Both date columns now use the same compact format.
acceptance_criteria: Created Date column format matches Modified Date format
Date format is compact and saves column space
Both date columns are consistent across reports and dashboards
ux_changes: Standardized Created Date column to use the same compact format as Modified Date.
implementation_notes: Date formatting change only — no data model changes needed.
comment_summary: Balaji completed and submitted for review.
